scripts.mdl: sh -c 'while [ "$1" = "--" ]; do shift; done && pnpm exec tsx packages/cli/src/dev.ts "$@"' --
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm --filter @jannchie/mdl-cli run build && pnpm --filter @jannchie/mdl-cli publish --access public
scripts.publish:core: pnpm --filter @jannchie/mdl-core run build && pnpm --filter @jannchie/mdl-core publish --access public
scripts.publish:sdk: pnpm --filter @jannchie/mdl-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @jannchie/mdl-sdk publish --access public
scripts.publish: pnpm run publish:core && pnpm run publish:sdk && pnpm run publish:cli
